\begin{align*} \Vert \bv \Vert^{2} \amp = \left( (\bv - \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k})+ \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k}, (\bv - \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k})+ \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k} \right)\\ \amp = ( \bv - \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k}, \bv - \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k})+ 2(\bv - \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k}, \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k})+ (\sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k},\sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k})\\ \amp = \Vert \bv - \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k}\Vert^{2}+ \Vert \sum_{k=1}^{N} c_{k} \bv_{k}\Vert^{2} \end{align*}
in-context
